# tmap.sources

Provides support for a variety of spatial data sources in ‘tmap’,
including remote, tiled, and streaming formats. Enables the use of
external vector and raster data without requiring full data import,
facilitating efficient visualization workflows.

# Package index

## Source metadata

- [`tmap_src_meta()`](https://r-tmap.github.io/tmap.sources/reference/tmap_src_meta.md)
  : Get tmap source metadata
- [`tmap_src_overture()`](https://r-tmap.github.io/tmap.sources/reference/tmap_src_overture.md)
  : Get Overture Maps PMTiles URLs

## Metadata accessors

Convenience functions to extract layers, variables, and categories from
a metadata object.

- [`tmap_src_layers()`](https://r-tmap.github.io/tmap.sources/reference/tmap_src_accessors.md)
  [`tmap_src_vars()`](https://r-tmap.github.io/tmap.sources/reference/tmap_src_accessors.md)
  [`tmap_src_cats()`](https://r-tmap.github.io/tmap.sources/reference/tmap_src_accessors.md)
  : Derived accessors for tmap source metadata
